items.title: Building pay-per-intelligence for AI agents: How Ampersend uses Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Payments
items.summary: In this post, you will learn how Ampersend built a pay-per-intelligence routing layer on top of Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Payments. AI agents autonomously route tasks to the most effective model, pay per request, and operate within spending budgets.
